title: Product Manager
summary: English-speaking product role focused on workflow tooling for cross-border teams.
fit: Expats targeting platform and SaaS companies with international teams.
affiliate: Resume builder plus interview prep copilot
visa_note: Looks like a realistic HSM-style international knowledge-work profile for the Netherlands.

title: Operations Analyst
summary: International operations role suited to English-speaking candidates relocating into the Netherlands.
fit: Applicants wanting logistics and operations work without needing Dutch first.
visa_note: English-friendly, but visa sponsorship is less obvious than in software or product roles.

title: Backend Engineer
summary: German-speaking backend role in a product-led software environment.
fit: Developers who want German-market roles with stronger local-language expectations.
affiliate: German CV template plus coding interview prep
visa_note: Local-language role first; not a clean expat sponsorship wedge.

title: Data Analyst
summary: Remote-first analytics role open to English-speaking talent across the EU.
fit: Candidates searching for English-speaking EU jobs outside Amsterdam’s competition.
visa_note: Remote-EU posture reduces relocation friction; immigration path depends on employer and residence plan.

title: Growth Marketer
summary: Italian-speaking growth role for a digital products team with international clients.
fit: Italian speakers who want a local-market role with modern remote tooling.
affiliate: Marketing CV template plus interview prep
visa_note: Language-specific local-market role, not positioned as a visa-first lane.

title: Customer Success Manager
summary: English-speaking customer success role in a remote-first EU SaaS team.
fit: Expats who want Italy-based work without a full Italian-language barrier.
visa_note: Remote-first reduces language barriers, but formal sponsorship is not explicit.

title: Product Designer
summary: Expat-friendly product design role with international hiring posture.
fit: English-speaking designers moving into southern Europe.
visa_note: Expat-friendly signal is stronger than sponsorship certainty.

title: Technical Support Lead
summary: Support leadership role in a city popular with English-speaking relocators.
fit: Candidates targeting expat-heavy hiring hubs in southern Europe.
visa_note: Good relocation city fit, but this preview does not assume sponsorship.

title: Account Executive
summary: English-speaking sales role in a market where many international tech firms hire.
fit: Job seekers wanting a familiar English-language market inside the EU.
visa_note: Native-English market fit is strong; visa path depends on the applicant's residence status.

title: Talent Partner
summary: International hiring role with multilingual teams and English-first workflows.
fit: Expat candidates targeting Brussels or pan-EU teams.
visa_note: Multinational hiring posture is positive, but visa status is not explicit.

title: Finance Analyst
summary: German-speaking finance role with a traditional local-market hiring profile.
fit: Candidates who want DACH-region roles and German-language matching.
visa_note: Traditional local-market hiring profile; not an expat-first wedge.

title: DevOps Engineer
summary: Remote DevOps role open to English-speaking candidates across the EU time zone.
fit: Engineers searching for EU jobs with lower-cost markets and remote flexibility.
affiliate: ATS resume builder plus technical interview prep
visa_note: Remote-EU fit is strong; immigration path depends on location and employer policy.

title: ML Engineer
summary: Applied ML role in a hardware-adjacent AI team with English-first technical collaboration.
fit: Strong match for internationals targeting AI and deep-tech roles in the Netherlands.
affiliate: ATS resume builder plus ML interview prep
visa_note: High-skill technical profile makes this a strong HSM-style preview candidate.

title: AI Product Manager
summary: AI product role connecting model teams, workflow automation, and international operator needs.
fit: Useful wedge for English-speaking PMs with AI or SaaS experience.
affiliate: Resume builder plus PM interview prep
visa_note: Knowledge-work profile and English-first posture make sponsorship more plausible than average.
